topAlert.title: OneUptime Admin Dashboard
topAlert.description: You can perform your OneUptime server related tasks on this dashboard.

users.title: Users
users.cardDescription: Here is a list of users in OneUptime.

userView.title: User
userView.masterAdminCardDescription: Grant or revoke master admin access for this user. Master admins can manage every project and workspace.

projects.title: Projects
projects.cardDescription: Here is a list of projects in OneUptime.

sendEmail.title: Send Announcement Email
sendEmail.testCardDescription: Send a test announcement email to a single email address to preview how it looks before sending to all users.
sendEmail.allCardDescription: Send an announcement email to all registered users. Please send a test email first to verify the content.
sendEmail.testSuccess: Test email sent successfully. Please check your inbox.
sendEmail.allSuccess: Broadcast email job has been started. Emails will be sent in the background.
sendEmail.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to send this announcement email to all registered users? This action cannot be undone.

moreEmail.title: Send Announcement Email
moreEmail.cardDescription: Compose an announcement email to send to all registered users. You can send a test email first to preview how it looks.
moreEmail.fillSubjectMessage: Please fill in subject and message before sending a test.
moreEmail.testModalDescription: Enter an email address to send a test of this announcement.
moreEmail.testModalMissingEmail: Please enter a test email address.
moreEmail.testSuccess: Test email sent successfully. Please check your inbox.
moreEmail.allSuccess: Broadcast email job has been started. Emails will be sent in the background.
moreEmail.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to send this announcement email to all registered users? This action cannot be undone.

authentication.authCardDescription: Authentication Settings for this OneUptime Server instance.
authentication.projectCreationCardDescription: Control who can create new projects on this OneUptime Server.

email.adminNotificationCardDescription: Enter the email address where you would like to receive admin-level notifications.
email.serverCardDescription: Pick which email server you would like to use to send emails.
email.smtpCardDescription: Please configure your SMTP server here to send emails.
email.sendgridCardDescription: Enter your Sendgrid API key to send emails through Sendgrid.
email.pillNoApiKey: Not Enabled. Please add the API key.
email.pillNoFromEmail: Not Enabled. Please add the From Email.
email.pillNoFromName: Not Enabled. Please add the From Name.

callSms.cardDescription: This will be used to make Call and send SMS.

whatsapp.metaCardDescription: Configure Meta WhatsApp credentials. These values are used to send WhatsApp notifications from OneUptime.
whatsapp.testCardDescription: Send a test WhatsApp template message to confirm your Meta configuration.
whatsapp.testSuccess: Test WhatsApp message sent successfully. Check the recipient device to confirm delivery.
whatsapp.testMissingNumber: Please enter a WhatsApp number before sending a test message.
whatsapp.testFailure: Failed to send test WhatsApp message.
whatsapp.setupCardDescription: Steps to connect Meta WhatsApp and the templates you must provision.

telegram.setupCardDescription: Read this first — it's the quickest path from zero to a working Telegram bot hooked up to OneUptime.
telegram.configCardDescription: Paste the bot token and username @BotFather gave you. These power outbound notifications; the secret token guards the incoming webhook.
telegram.testCardDescription: Send a test Telegram message to confirm your bot configuration.
telegram.testSuccess: Test Telegram message sent successfully. Check the recipient device to confirm delivery.
telegram.testMissingChatId: Please enter a Telegram chat ID before sending a test message.
telegram.testFailure: Failed to send test Telegram message.

probes.bannerTitle: Need help with setting up Global Probes?
probes.bannerDescription: Here is a guide which will help you get set up
probes.cardDescription: Global Probes help you monitor external resources from different locations around the world.
probes.keyModalDescription: Here is your probe key. Please keep this a secret.

aiAgents.bannerTitle: Need help with setting up Global AI Agents?
aiAgents.bannerDescription: Here is a guide which will help you get set up
aiAgents.cardDescription: Global AI Agents help you automate incident management with AI-powered responses from different locations around the world.
aiAgents.keyModalDescription: Here is your AI agent key. Please keep this a secret.

dataRetention.logCardDescription: Configure how long monitor logs are retained before being automatically deleted.
dataRetention.metricCardDescription: Configure how long monitor metrics are retained before being automatically deleted.

apiKey.cardDescription: This API key has root access to all the resources in all the projects on OneUptime.

llmProviders.bannerTitle: Need help with setting up LLM Providers?
llmProviders.bannerDescription: LLM Providers enable AI features. You can configure global LLM Providers that are available to all projects.
llmProviders.cardDescription: Global LLM Providers are available to all projects for AI features. Configure OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Mistral, Ollama, or other LLM providers.
llmProviders.noItems: No LLM Providers configured. Add an LLM Provider to enable AI features.
